## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on ongoing projects and prioritize tasks for the week ahead.](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AI-led Growth website is top priority; focus on launching webinar content and improving user flow](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [GrowthX website redesign needs team discussion; Edin has concerns about new aesthetic](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Event graphics system needs refinement, particularly for dinner events](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Client work (e.g., Smith.ai) to be prioritized after AI-led Growth and event graphics](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

## Topics

### AI-led Growth Website Launch

  - [Webinar recording uploaded; access groups created](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Users can now see signup button and feed, but most content hidden until signup](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Edin suggests using Circle's built-in teaser functionality for content](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Jason considering Notion alternative for easy sharing with select individuals (e.g., CMOs)](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Plan: Use Circle's preview feature, create intro post, curate content to appear more robust](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

### GrowthX Website Redesign

  - [New design received from Ren; full rebrand not yet seen](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Edin expressed concerns about aesthetic aspects of new design](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Jason sees improvement in "human" element but notes need for more AI and workflow balance](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Next steps: Edin to articulate specific enhancement ideas, team discussion when Ren returns](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Event Graphics System

  - [Current Canva templates being used for events (breakfasts, dinners, workshops)](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Breakfast templates generally good; dinner templates (e.g., Majorana) need improvement](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Goal: Create a more systematic approach for event graphics, possibly moving beyond Canva](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Client Work and Other Projects

  - [Additional requests from Smith.ai pending](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Surge website (Webflow) status unclear; Jason to sync with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Output episodes design status uncertain](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)

### Project Prioritization

1.  AI-led Growth website
2.  Event graphics system refinement
3.  Client work (e.g., Smith.ai requests)
4.  GrowthX website redesign (pending team discussion)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason: Sync with Marcel about Surge website (Webflow) status](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

  - [Team: Reconvene Wednesday to reassess GrowthX website redesign priority](https://fathom.video/share/M3LrDTDpA1L2_BQNv_iLzLZVYPu3vAAs?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
